sections.heading: Student Guidance
sections.description: Advising students on course selection, study techniques, and academic goals.

sections.heading: Career Planning
sections.description: Helping students identify career interests, set career goals, and understand educational pathways related to their career aspirations.

sections.heading: Application Assistance
sections.description: Assisting students with college applications, including essay writing, interview preparation, and application strategies.

sections.heading: School Selection
sections.description: Providing advice on choosing the right colleges or universities based on academic interests, career goals, and personal preferences.

sections.heading: Individualized Education Plans (IEPs)
sections.description: Helping create or review IEPs for students with special needs to ensure their educational requirements are met.

sections.heading: Support Services
sections.description: Advising on appropriate resources, accommodations, and support services for students with disabilities.

sections.heading: Technology Planning
sections.description: Assisting schools or educational institutions in selecting and implementing technology tools and platforms.

sections.heading: Training
sections.description: Providing training for teachers and administrators on how to effectively use educational technology.

sections.heading: Curriculum Design
sections.description: Helping schools or educational institutions design and implement effective curricula that meet educational standards and student needs.

sections.heading: Assessment Strategies
sections.description: Advising on assessment methods and tools to evaluate student progress and curriculum effectiveness.

sections.heading: Strategic Planning
sections.description: Helping educational institutions develop and implement strategic plans for growth and improvement.

sections.heading: Program Evaluation
sections.description: Assessing the effectiveness of educational programs and suggesting improvements.
